# Risk reversal offer

## When to use

Use when fear blocks action.

## Why it works

Lowers cost of being wrong.

## Mechanism

Buyers do not need full trust to test.

## Required inputs

Trial, guarantee, pilot, setup support.

## When not to use

If abuse destroys unit economics.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

CTA rate, trial starts, activation, refund rate.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
